original_text: ### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. **Layout (explicit):** - **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images. - **Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. - **Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px. **Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical. **Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals. ## MJML ```xml Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯ ``` If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

relations.note: Signature button radius is a locked sub-spec of the gradient CTA layout.
Background asset/fallback rules refine the gradient CTA section background binding.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
**Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px).

rules.intent: Lock the branded gradient callout CTA composition and styling.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section is a full-width (600px) banner with a headline and a single button, both horizontally centered and stacked. Background is the approved gradient PNG applied as section background (cover, no-repeat, center) with section padding 48px 25px 56px 25px. Headline sits in the top third, Brand Blue (#00529b), Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line, centered. Button sits lower-middle below the headline, centered: Deep Blue fill (#003D74), white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), Gold arrow › (#FFC20E, 24px) after two non-breaking spaces, size 248 × 64px.

    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

rules.intent: Guarantee the approved gradient asset and its email-client-safe fallback.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout background image is the specific hosted Gradient_callout.png asset — do not re-host or recolor it. Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine (#faa31b) as fallback since clients like Outlook drop background images. The background image may be skipped only in very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget); when skipped, the section still renders on the solid Sunshine (#faa31b) fill and every other rule stays identical. If skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position — keep background-color="#faa31b", headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.
